# NEL Innovation Labs - Complete Product Documentation

## Company Overview
NEL Innovation Labs is an AI development studio based in Sydney, Australia, specializing in production-ready AI systems for businesses. Founded as an AI-first development company, NEL focuses on building rather than consulting, delivering measurable business impact through custom AI solutions.

## Value Proposition
NEL Innovation Labs builds AI systems that actually work in production. Unlike traditional consultants, NEL ships production-ready AI systems from custom development to full product launches with measurable business impact.

## Featured Projects

### Beyond RV
Digital platform rebuild from legacy WordPress to Astro + React, deployed on Netlify. Includes 16-product catalogue, AI customer support, lead intelligence, and an admin AI copilot that can safely manage site content and operations.
- **Tech:** Astro, React, Netlify, OpenAI
- **Outcome:** #1-2 brand search ranking, ChatGPT discovery
- **URL:** https://beyondrv.com.au

### Tradie Shield
AI financial guardian for Australian construction businesses. Connects to Xero and Tradify, monitors job costs in real time, and proactively texts tradies when a job is heading over budget. Entire interface is SMS — no app required.
- **Tech:** React, TypeScript, Vite, Fastify, Node.js, Supabase (PostgreSQL), OpenAI GPT-5.5, Twilio, Xero API, Redis, Docker, Netlify, Render
- **Metrics:** 55,000+ lines of TypeScript, 231 source files, 53 database migrations, 46 API endpoints
- **URL:** https://tradieshield.com.au

### Unimog Community Hub
Vehicle enthusiast community platform with AI diagnostics (Barry AI mechanic). Features include community features, trip planning, event management, and marketplace.
- **Tech:** React, Supabase, AI (Two-Pass RAG)
- **Metrics:** 95% answer accuracy, 60+ database tables
- **URL:** https://unimogcommunityhub.com

### AI Query Hub
Document analysis and AI productivity platform with tiered SaaS pricing (Starter/Pro/Business). Features include document management, AI analysis, task planning, and team collaboration.
- **Tech:** React, Supabase, AI
- **URL:** https://aiqueryhub.com

### Wheels & Wins
Vehicle enthusiast community platform with trip planning, budget tracking, event management, and live marketplace.
- **Tech:** React, Supabase
- **URL:** https://wheelsandwins.com

## Past Projects

### Personal AI Manager (PAM)
Personal AI assistant with 6 specialized agents for voice detection, calendar integration, task management, and WebSocket streaming.

### Pattern Scribe AI Magic
AI-powered pattern documentation for the fashion industry. Features PDF generation, AI pattern analysis, brand integration, and export tools.

### AI Boost Campaign
Multi-agent marketing automation platform with 50+ Python agents, 18 Edge Functions, multi-model AI, campaign logic, and SEO automation.

### News Spark Editor
AI-native broadcast news production pipeline with multi-model AI (OpenAI Whisper, Gemini 1.5 Pro, Claude Opus 4.6, FFmpeg).

## Services

### Custom AI Development
Production-ready AI systems built from scratch with demonstrated results. Architecture design, full-stack implementation, CI/CD and monitoring.

### AI Strategy & Architecture
Complex system design based on battle-tested patterns. Technical deep-dive assessment, ROI-focused implementation plan, risk mitigation framework.

### Product Development
End-to-end AI product development from MVP to market. Market research and validation, MVP to production pipeline, scale and growth support.

## Technical Architecture

### Technology Stack
- **Frontend:** React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Fastify (Node.js), TypeScript
- **Database:** PostgreSQL via Supabase
- **AI Models:** OpenAI, Claude, Gemini
- **SMS:** Twilio
- **Accounting:** Xero API (OAuth 2.0)
- **Job Management:** Tradify API
- **Hosting:** Netlify (frontend), Render (backend)
- **Monitoring:** Sentry, Pino structured logging

### Development Approach
NEL follows a production-first methodology, building systems that demonstrate measurable outcomes rather than proof-of-concepts. All systems are designed with proper authentication, real-time processing, and multi-user architecture from day one.

## Target Audience

### Primary Users
- **Businesses** requiring custom AI integration into existing systems
- **Startups** needing AI-powered product development from concept to launch
- **Enterprises** seeking complex AI system architecture and multi-agent orchestration

### Industries Served
- **Media & Broadcasting** (News Spark Editor)
- **Automotive** (Unimog Hub, Wheels & Wins)
- **Fashion** (Pattern Scribe AI)
- **Construction & Trade Services** (Tradie Shield)
- **Education** (Video Course Platform)
- **Marketing** (AI Boost Campaign)

## Pricing Model
Custom project pricing based on scope and complexity. NEL works with clients on project scoping and provides tailored pricing for development timelines and technical requirements. Typical engagements range from $50k to $250k+.

## Geographic Focus
Primary operations in Australia with international client capabilities. Based in Sydney with demonstrated experience serving Australian and global markets.

## FAQ

### What is NEL Innovation Labs?
NEL Innovation Labs is an AI development studio that designs, builds, and ships production-ready AI systems for businesses. We are developers, not consultants — every system we deliver runs in production serving real users.

### What does NEL actually build?
Production AI systems including: AI financial monitoring platforms (Tradie Shield), document analysis products (AI Query Hub), intelligent e-commerce systems (Beyond RV), vehicle community platforms (Unimog Community Hub, Wheels & Wins), and multi-agent marketing automation platforms.

### Who does NEL work with?
Businesses, startups, and enterprises needing custom AI development or full-stack AI product development. Clients are in media, automotive, construction, fashion, education, and marketing. Based in Sydney, Australia, serving clients globally.

### How is NEL different from an AI consultant?
NEL designs, codes, deploys, and supports the systems ourselves. Consultants deliver slides and strategy documents. We deliver working software in production with measurable outcomes.

### How much does a project cost?
Every project is scoped individually. Typical engagements range from $50k to $250k+. We provide a fixed-price proposal after consultation.

### What technologies does NEL use?
React, TypeScript, Vite, Fastify, Node.js, Supabase (PostgreSQL), OpenAI, Twilio, Tailwind CSS. Deployed on Netlify, Render, and Vercel.

### How long does a project take?
4-8 weeks for a specialised AI agent, 12-20 weeks for a full-stack product platform.

### Do you work with clients outside Australia?
Yes. Based in Sydney but work globally via remote engagement model.

### What happens after delivery?
Post-launch support, handover documentation, and ongoing maintenance options.

## Contact Information
- **Website:** https://nelinnovationlabs.com
- **Email:** info@nelinnovationlabs.com
- **Location:** Sydney, Australia
- **Business Name:** NEL Innovation Labs Pty Ltd

## Company Status
Active development studio with production AI systems demonstrating real-world implementations and measurable business outcomes.
